---
title: "DataSOC -- Centro de Datos Sociales"
pagetitle: "datasoc Website"
page-layout: custom
format: html
page-navigation: false
toc: false
about:
  image: "resources/imagenes/sharing-default-2.png"
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle

# listing:
  
# - id: analisis
#   contents: 
#     - analisis/posts/*/*.qmd
#   sort: date desc
#   type: grid
#   grid-columns: 3
#   image-height: 150px
#   fields: [image, title, description]
#   max-items: 1
#   categories: false
#   sort-ui: false
#   filter-ui: false
#   feed: false  
  
# - id: noticias
#   contents: 
#     - noticias/posts/*/*.qmd
#     - "!noticias/posts/drafts/*qmd"
#   sort: date desc
#   type: grid
#   grid-columns: 3
#   image-height: 150px
#   fields: [image, title, description]
#   max-items: 6
#   categories: false
#   sort-ui: false
#   filter-ui: false
#   feed: false  
#   
# - id: reportes
#   contents:
#     - reportes/posts/*/*.qmd
#   sort: date desc
#   type: default
#   fields: [title, date, author]
#   max-items: 4
#   categories: false
#   sort-ui: false
#   feed: false
#   page-size: 500
#   
# - id: equipo
#   template: people-box.ejs
#   contents: 
#     - equipo/posts/*/*.qmd
#   sort: date desc
---

:::hero-heading
<div class="hero-heading-wrapper">
<div id="particles-js" class="particles-layer" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="hero-heading-content">
<img src="resources/imagenes/sharing-default-2.png"
     class="img-fluid mb-3"
     alt="datasoc"
     style="width:90%;max-width:900px;display:block;margin:0 auto;">
</div>
</div>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/particles.js@2.0.0/particles.min.js" integrity="sha384-oHYQNeDBTZNj6KnIfJMAzcEn2OTbeMKKXFeEwU6T+pH0oS1yTIzEBaW6BXmCtvs2" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<script>
window.addEventListener("load", function () {
  var container = document.getElementById("particles-js");
  if (window.particlesJS && container) {
    window.particlesJS("particles-js", {
      "particles": {
        "number": {
          "value": 130,
          "density": {
            "enable": true,
            "value_area": 800
          }
        },
        "color": {
          "value": "#ac221e"
        },
        "shape": {
          "type": "circle",
          "stroke": {
            "width": 0,
            "color": "#000000"
          },
          "polygon": {
            "nb_sides": 3
          },
          "image": {
            "src": "img/github.svg",
            "width": 100,
            "height": 100
          }
        },
        "opacity": {
          "value": 0.5,
          "random": false,
          "anim": {
            "enable": false,
            "speed": 1,
            "opacity_min": 0.1,
            "sync": false
          }
        },
        "size": {
          "value": 3,
          "random": true,
          "anim": {
            "enable": true,
            "speed": 40,
            "size_min": 0.1,
            "sync": false
          }
        },
        "line_linked": {
          "enable": true,
          "distance": 143.94242303078775,
          "color": "#ff0000",
          "opacity": 0.4,
          "width": 1
        },
        "move": {
          "enable": true,
          "speed": 6,
          "direction": "top-right",
          "random": false,
          "straight": false,
          "out_mode": "out",
          "bounce": false,
          "attract": {
            "enable": false,
            "rotateX": 600,
            "rotateY": 1200
          }
        }
      },
      "interactivity": {
        "detect_on": "canvas",
        "events": {
          "onhover": {
            "enable": true,
            "mode": "repulse"
          },
          "onclick": {
            "enable": true,
            "mode": "push"
          },
          "resize": true
        },
        "modes": {
          "grab": {
            "distance": 400,
            "line_linked": {
              "opacity": 1
            }
          },
          "bubble": {
            "distance": 400,
            "size": 40,
            "duration": 2,
            "opacity": 8,
            "speed": 3
          },
          "repulse": {
            "distance": 200,
            "duration": 0.4
          },
          "push": {
            "particles_nb": 4
          },
          "remove": {
            "particles_nb": 2
          }
        }
      },
      "retina_detect": false
    });
  }
});
</script>
:::

<!-- ====================== DATASOC ====================== -->
::: {.parallax-container}
::: {.parallax-image-container2}
<div>
  <p class="section-title">
    <span class="data-style">data</span><span class="soc-style">SOC</span>
  </p>
  <p class="section-lead">
    <span class="data-style">data</span><span class="soc-style">SOC</span> es el Centro de Datos Sociales de la Facultad de Ciencias Sociales de la Universidad de Chile. Su objetivo es posicionar a FACSO como un referente en el análisis, procesamiento, gestión y transferencia de datos sociales, en un marco de ciencia abierta, guiado por altos estándares conceptuales, metodológicos y éticos. 
  </p>
  </div>
  
<a href="#lineas">
  <button class="btn-21">
    <span>Nuestras Líneas<br>de Trabajo</span>
  </button>
</a>
:::
:::

<!-- ====================== Líneas ====================== -->
::: {.section-text}
::: {.section-container}


<p class="section-title" style="text-align:center;">
  <i class="bi bi-hexagon-fill" style="margin-right: 10px;"></i><span class="soc-style">LÍNEAS DE TRABAJO</span>
</p>


::: {#lineas}

<div class="hex-buttons">

  <!-- I -->
  <a href="#i" class="btn-hex" title="I">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 115" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <polygon points="50,4 96,28 96,87 50,111 4,87 4,28" fill="#5a5a5a"/>
      <polygon points="50,9 91,32 91,83 50,106 9,83 9,32" fill="#ac221e"/>
      <text x="50" y="85" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="80" fill="#7a0a0a">I</text>
      <text x="50" y="63" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">INVESTIGACIÓN</text>
    </svg>
  </a>

  <!-- F -->
  <a href="#f" class="btn-hex" title="F">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 115" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <polygon points="50,4 96,28 96,87 50,111 4,87 4,28" fill="#5a5a5a"/>
      <polygon points="50,9 91,32 91,83 50,106 9,83 9,32" fill="#ac221e"/>
      <text x="50" y="85" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="72" fill="#7a0a0a">F</text>
      <text x="50" y="63" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">FORMACIÓN</text>
    </svg>
  </a>

  <!-- T -->
  <a href="#t" class="btn-hex" title="T">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 115" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <polygon points="50,4 96,28 96,87 50,111 4,87 4,28" fill="#5a5a5a"/>
      <polygon points="50,9 91,32 91,83 50,106 9,83 9,32" fill="#ac221e"/>
      <text x="50" y="85" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="72" fill="#7a0a0a">T</text>
      <text x="50" y="55" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">TRANSFERENCIA</text>
        <text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">E IMPACTO</text>
    </svg>
  </a>

  <!-- C -->
  <a href="#c" class="btn-hex" title="C">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 115" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <polygon points="50,4 96,28 96,87 50,111 4,87 4,28" fill="#5a5a5a"/>
      <polygon points="50,9 91,32 91,83 50,106 9,83 9,32" fill="#ac221e"/>
      <text x="50" y="85" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="72" fill="#7a0a0a">C</text>
      <text x="50" y="55" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">CERTIFICACIÓN</text>
        <text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">DE CALIDAD</text>
    </svg>
  </a>

  <!-- G -->
  <a href="#g" class="btn-hex" title="G">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 100 115" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <polygon points="50,4 96,28 96,87 50,111 4,87 4,28" fill="#5a5a5a"/>
      <polygon points="50,9 91,32 91,83 50,106 9,83 9,32" fill="#ac221e"/>
      <text x="50" y="85" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="72" fill="#7a0a0a">G</text>
      <text x="50" y="55" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">GOBERNANZA</text>
        <text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle"
        font-family="Oswald, Impact, sans-serif" font-weight="350"
        font-size="12" fill="white" letter-spacing="0.5">DE DATOS</text>
    </svg>
  </a>

</div>

<style>
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  .btn-hex { opacity: 0; }
</style>

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    var buttons = document.querySelectorAll(".btn-hex");

    var observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
      entries.forEach(function(entry) {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          buttons.forEach(function(btn, index) {
            setTimeout(function() {
              btn.style.animation = "fadeIn 1s forwards";
            }, index * 600);
          });
          observer.disconnect();
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.3 });

    var lineas = document.getElementById("lineas");
    if (lineas) observer.observe(lineas);
  });
</script>
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ====================== Proyectos ====================== -->
::: {.parallax-container}
::: {.parallax-image-container}
<div class="parallax-inner">
  <p class="section-title">
    <i class="bi bi-briefcase-fill" style="margin-right: 10px;"></i><span class="soc-style">PROYECTOS Y REPORTES</span>
  </p>
</div>

::: {#proyectos}
:::
:::
:::

<!-- ====================== Noticias ====================== -->
::: {.section-text}
::: {.section-container}


<p class="section-title" style="text-align:center;">
  <i class="bi bi-newspaper" style="margin-right: 10px;"></i><span class="soc-style">NOTICIAS</span>
</p>


::: {#noticias}
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ====================== Equipo ====================== -->
::: {.parallax-container}
::: {.parallax-image-container}
<div class="parallax-inner">
  <p class="section-title">
    <i class="bi bi-people-fill" style="margin-right: 10px;"></i><span class="soc-style">EQUIPO</span>
  </p>
</div>

::: {#equipo}
:::
:::
:::
